_notes: FirstEnergy/ATSI transmission & substation projects. This is the 'grid work near sites' layer — construction-phase switching/cutovers on these projects are a plausible direct cause of local outages.
verify:true = town-level approximate coords. FE's Ohio transmission projects page + OPSB dockets (case numbers) give exact routes/parcels.
type: substation | line ; status: construction | planned | complete
Source of truth for additions: firstenergycorp.com/about/transmission_projects/ohio.html (also /pennsylvania.html etc.) and OPSB case search.

projects.name: Fulton Co. 345kV substation + 9-mi line (Delta Village area)
projects.source: FE newsroom Oct 2025: new 345kV substation (in service Dec 2026) + 9-mile line, Delta/Fulton/Pike/Swan Creek/York twps; part of >$200M ATSI NW Ohio program

projects.name: Sylvania Twp substation expansion (Lucas Co.)
projects.source: FE newsroom Oct 2024: ~$15M, 17k->49.9k sqft, sectionalized bus; in service early 2025; 20k+ customers

projects.name: Niles-Shenango 345kV line rebuild
projects.source: FE Ohio Transmission Projects list. Lordstown/Stargate corridor; point marks Niles end - route runs NE toward PA border

projects.name: Lordstown substation (built for Ultium Cells)
projects.source: FE newsroom Feb 2021: $19.6M substation + 0.5-mi 138kV tie for Ultium; precedent for large-load builds at the GM site now hosting Stargate

projects.name: Valley Link / MARL 500kV (FirstEnergy-awarded, WV→VA)
projects.source: PJM 2024 open-window award to a FirstEnergy-led venture: new ~500kV line through the WV panhandle/Valley corridor built explicitly to move power toward NoVA data center load. YOUR utility's wires, THEIR load — the Burden-tab thesis in steel. Verify exact routing via PJM/SCC dockets; centroid approximate.

projects.name: Dominion Aspen-Golden 500kV rebuild (Loudoun)
projects.source: Part of Dominion's multi-line Loudoun buildout for Alley load; context layer for the corridor view. Verify current project names via Dominion/SCC filings.
